justifications.clarity: The retrospective 'Where We Have Been' context box and the parallel DAG-to-three-pattern exposition guide the reader naturally; the SR 11-7 three-lines-of-defence content is the one dense stretch that would benefit from an orienting table.
justifications.rigor: The fairness impossibility proposition is correctly stated and attributed, and the RRF formula is accurate, but the 'OpenClaw' privacy-by-default claims (Section 3.3) are presented as architectural facts without independent citation or benchmark evidence, and feedback loop bias lacks the formal model the section implies.
justifications.completeness: All eight learning objectives are addressed across six well-populated sections, but only one formal exercise exists in the entire chapter (Exercise ex:ch07-illustration) — the project convention requires at least one [B], [I], and [A] difficulty exercise per file, creating a structural gap.
justifications.pedagogy: Learning objectives are stated clearly at the outset and the closing researcher/practitioner synthesis is effective, but the single exercise has no difficulty tag and the chapter provides no [B] or [A] exercises, violating the difficulty-distribution convention.
justifications.style: Prose is natural expert writing throughout with no paragraph-heading crutches; however, figure caption at line 661 embeds three benchmark citations as inline author-year text ('Chen et al., 2021', 'Malo et al., 2014', 'Maia et al., 2018') rather than proper \cite{} commands, a formatting inconsistency.
